case_title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CA. CORP. VS. DORETHA TAYLOR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CA. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 BERTHA LANE, #165, S.F., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CA. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CA. CORP. SERVED JUL-08-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION FOR DAILY RENTAL; $ 18.46-PER-DAY; AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CA. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DORETHA
